# GitHub Copilot Instructions

The full, tool-agnostic instructions for this repository live in **[AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md)**
at the repository root.

Read `AGENTS.md` before generating code — it is the single source of truth for the tech
stack, critical rules (DI/configuration, language policy, type safety, security), code style,
testing, and commit conventions. Deep references (architecture, coding standards, patterns)
are linked from there.

Do not duplicate guidance here — update `AGENTS.md` instead.

- Path-scoped instructions: [`.github/instructions/`](instructions/)
- Task prompts: [`.github/prompts/`](prompts/)
- Agent definitions: [`.github/agents/`](agents/)
